products.title: Product Matrix
products.subtitle: Two strategic tracks — low-altitude systems and clean-mobility infrastructure

items.name: LingYI-Charge Mobile EV Charging Robot
items.desc: Autonomous mobile EV-charging robot for smart parks, commercial complexes and large parking lots. 100 kWh onboard storage, one-tap app booking, LiDAR SLAM navigation and computer-vision plug-in — upgrading fixed chargers into a 'charger-comes-to-car' service.

items.name: LingYI-1 VTOL Fixed-Wing UAV
items.summary: Vertical takeoff · 2,000 km range · 40 kg payload
items.desc: A large VTOL fixed-wing UAV built for industrial inspection, security reconnaissance and emergency response. 3 m wingspan, fuel-electric hybrid power breaks battery limits, 2,000 km single-sortie coverage at 180 km/h cruise — operating from urban streets to remote terrain with no runway.

solutions.title: Applications
solutions.subtitle: Eight real business scenarios — straight from our product handbook, spanning low-altitude operations and clean-mobility infrastructure.

scenarios.name: Pipeline & Grid Inspection
scenarios.headline: VTOL · Pipeline Inspection
scenarios.desc: For oil pipelines, power transmission lines and PV plant inspections. 180 km/h cruise + 2,000 km range covers 100+ km of corridor per sortie. Onboard vision automatically flags construction encroachment, overgrowth and equipment anomalies. A 40 kg payload carries optical and thermal cameras simultaneously — multi-spectrum inspection in a single flight.

scenarios.name: Emergency Response & Damage Assessment
scenarios.headline: VTOL · Emergency Response
scenarios.desc: After earthquakes, floods or wildfires, takes off vertically with no runway and reaches the disaster site fast — streaming live footage for command decisions. Thermal imaging finds trapped people and assesses structural damage; onboard loudspeaker broadcasts evacuation instructions; 2,000 km range sustains long deployments.

scenarios.name: Tactical & Public Security
scenarios.headline: VTOL · Tactical & Public Security
scenarios.desc: 3 m wingspan flying-wing layout, 200 km/h top speed — built for rapid close-in surveillance and area patrols. Optical-electronic pods enable 24/7 reconnaissance; loudspeakers support crowd management and dispersal. Ground station coordinates multi-UAV networks into a regional aerial awareness system.

scenarios.name: Agro-forestry Remote Sensing
scenarios.headline: VTOL · Agro-forestry Sensing
scenarios.desc: Multispectral cameras map farmland and forest at scale, generating NDVI vegetation-index maps for precision fertilization, pest detection and timber-volume estimation. At 180 km/h cruise, a single sortie covers thousands of mu (hundreds of hectares).

scenarios.name: Commercial Complex & Office
scenarios.headline: Charge · Commercial Complex
scenarios.desc: Malls and office parks typically have under-provisioned EV charging — drivers queue and wait. With LingYI-Charge, drivers park anywhere and book via app, lifting parking-lot service quality and customer satisfaction; property operators earn ongoing revenue via service-fee sharing.

scenarios.name: Residential Communities
scenarios.headline: Charge · Residential
scenarios.desc: Older residential complexes have limited electrical capacity and high retrofit costs — fixed chargers are hard to install at scale. The mobile charging robot stores energy at off-peak night rates and serves residents by day — no grid-capacity upgrade needed.

scenarios.name: Industrial & Tech Parks
scenarios.headline: Charge · Industrial Park
scenarios.desc: Industrial parks have scattered buildings and low fixed-charger coverage. Mobile charging robots patrol the park 24/7 on standby; employees book on demand, lifting overall park amenities.

scenarios.name: Events & Exhibitions
scenarios.headline: Charge · Events
scenarios.desc: Auto shows, motorsport and music festivals lack permanent charging infrastructure. LingYI-Charge deploys on demand and leaves after the event — zero capital investment in fixed equipment.

productDetail.specsTBD: Full datasheet available on request — we typically reply within 1-2 business days.

features.title: App booking + autonomous navigation
features.desc: Users book via QR or app; the robot plans its route to the target stall and copes with weak-GPS underground garages.

features.title: Vision-guided auto plug-in
features.desc: RGB-D depth camera locates the charging port; the robotic arm docks autonomously — no human assistance needed.

features.title: Cloud fleet scheduling
features.desc: Multi-robot coordination by battery, location and booking queue — maximizing uptime and service efficiency.

features.title: VTOL + cruise dual-mode
features.desc: Takes off and lands in place with no runway; switches to fixed-wing for 180 km/h economy cruise — flexible deployment and long-range work in one airframe.

features.title: 2,000 km extended range
features.desc: Fuel engine + onboard battery hybrid breaks battery-only limits — a single sortie covers 100+ km of linear infrastructure.

features.title: Large payload, multi-mission
features.desc: 40 kg payload simultaneously carries optical/thermal cameras, loudspeakers and release mechanisms for multi-task missions.

about.title: About Zero-One Innovation
about.lead: Shenzhen Zero-One Innovation Technology Co., Ltd. — focused on China's low-altitude economy and clean-mobility tracks.
about.body:
Shenzhen Zero-One Innovation Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2026, co-established by graduates from the AI School of Shenzhen Technology University and the University of Hong Kong. We're a technology company focused on the R&D, manufacturing and sale of intelligent robots and specialty UAVs.

We focus on two core tracks:
· Clean-mobility infrastructure — LingYI-Charge mobile EV-charging robot, solving the 'last mile' of EV charging
· Low-altitude economy systems — LingYI-1 VTOL fixed-wing UAV, serving industrial inspection, security reconnaissance and emergency response

Our core team brings together expertise in robot motion control, UAV aerodynamics, AI vision, and embedded systems — capable of delivering end-to-end from product definition through prototyping to low-volume production.

We operate by the principle of 'fearless and meticulous' — bringing intelligent robotics into real industry use to create measurable commercial value for our customers.
about.techDesc: Full-stack in-house: mechanics, embedded firmware, AI algorithms and cloud all owned end-to-end. 3D printing + composites + CNC compress prototype cycles to 4 weeks. Domestic-sourced sensors + in-house control algorithms lower BOM by 40%+ versus peers.
